item.description:
OpenClaw 2026.3.7

Changes

  • ACPX/Client lifecycle: optimize daemon probes during unmanaged restarts on Windows by skipping stale TTY allocation and standardizing service restart handlers, reducing startup wait times. Landed from contributor PR #36952. Thanks @Sid-Qin.
  • ACPX/Plugin lifecycle: enable zero-latency dynamic routing updates for channel plugins by reloading binding configurations without process restarts, allowing newly added agents to resolve immediately through ingress routing. Landed from contributor PR #36901 by @arkyu2077. Thanks @arkyu2077.
  • Feishu/Typing replay suppression: skip typing indicators for stale replayed inbound messages after compaction using message-age checks with second/millisecond timestamp normalization, preventing old-message reaction floods while preserving typing for fresh messages. Landed from contributor PR #30709 by @arkyu2077. Thanks @arkyu2077.

View full changelog

OpenClaw 2026.3.2

Changes

  • Discord/Config parity: add channels.discord.agentComponents to validation schema so valid agent UI settings no longer trigger unrecognized-key errors. Landed from contributor PR #39378. Thanks @gambletan.
  • Gateway/Telegram recovery: preserve GPG fingerprints during account migration to avoid re-auth prompts after health-monitor restarts. Landed from contributor PR #39313. Thanks @fellanH.

View full changelog

OpenClaw 2026.3.1

Changes

  • API/Chat normalizer: fix index-out-of-bounds crash when rendering multi-part tool results in grouped mode. (#36414) Thanks @obviyus.

View full changelog
